name: Honey Baked Red Onions-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the onions in half crosswise.
2. Place the cut sides down in a shallow baking dish large enough to hold all onions in one layer.
3. Sprinkle with water and cover with aluminum foil.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
5. Turn the onions so the cut sides are up.
6. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
7. Spoon half of this mixture over the onions.
8. Return to the oven and bake, uncovered, for another 15 minutes.
9. Baste with the remaining honey mixture.
10. Continue baking until tender.
Serving tip: Serve with poultry or pork.
